column4: User Story
As an Family Contact, I need a secure, personal login (username/password/MFA) so that I can access my family member’s care information confidentially and safely.

As an Family Contact (e.g., an adult child), I need the ability to view and toggle between multiple linked residents (e.g., two parents) after a single sign-in, so that I can manage all my family members efficiently from one account.

As an Family Contact, I need to view a high-level summary of attendance, activities participated in (e.g., 'Mom attended devotional activity today'), and overall engagement, so that I can gauge their daily well-being and social interaction.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to receive an email invitation from the facility to set up my portal access.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to set up my password during first-time login using the invitation link.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to reset the password if I forgot the password.
As an Family Contact, after entering my credentials I should receive a One-Time Password (OTP) on my registered email and should be able to resend otp.
As an Family Contact, during first-time setup I should be able to fill in my basic information personal Info & Address Info.

As an Family Contact, after completing profile setup I should be able to select which linked resident (family member) I want to view, seeing their name, room number, and program type (ADH/ALF), so that I can navigate to the correct resident's dashboard.
As an Family Contact, I should see a welcome/getting started screen after first login that introduces the portal features and guides me through initial setup.

As an Family Contact, I should be able to view a dashboard summary showing Family Members count, Active Alerts count, Open Tickets count, and Next Visit date at the top of the dashboard, so that I get a quick overview of all important information.

As an Family Contact, I should be able to view my loved one's photo, name, program type (ADH/ALF), relationship, facility name, room number, and Comfortability score on the dashboard, so that I can see their basic information at a glance.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view an Overall Progress bar (e.g., 'Improving') for my loved one on the dashboard, so that I can track their general health trajectory.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view my loved one's current Pain Scale rating on the dashboard, so that I am aware of their comfort level.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view the frequency/schedule information for my loved one's care visits on the dashboard.

As an Family Contact, I should be able to view enrollment details on the dashboard including Start Attending date, Admitted Date, Expected Discharge date, and Payment type (e.g., Medicaid), so that I stay informed about care timelines.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view the assigned Case Manager name, Case Manager Contact number on the dashboard, so that I know who to contact for care coordination.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view a monthly attendance calendar on the dashboard showing which days my loved one attended the facility, so that I can monitor their participation.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view active alerts (e.g., 'High Vitals Detected') on the dashboard with brief descriptions, so that I am immediately aware of any urgent matters.

As an Family Contact, I should be able to view recent incidents on the dashboard showing incident type, date, time, and location (e.g., 'Medication Delay - Dining Hall'), so that I can stay informed of any issues.

As an Family Contact, I should be able to view a summary of my loved one's recent vitals on the dashboard (e.g., Blood Pressure, Heart Rate, Weight, BMI, SpO2, Temperature, Blood Glucose, Height), so that I can monitor their health at a glance.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view my loved one's allergy summary on the dashboard showing Allergy Type, Allergies, and Reaction, so that I am aware of critical health information.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view my open support tickets on the dashboard, so that I can quickly check ticket status without navigating away.

As an Family Contact with multiple linked residents, I should be able to toggle/switch between residents on the dashboard (e.g., Devon Lane / Linda Lane tabs), so that I can view each family member's information without logging out.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to click a 'Request Meet' quick action button on the dashboard to quickly initiate an appointment request without navigating to the Appointments section.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to click a 'Create Ticket' quick action button on the dashboard to quickly create a support ticket without navigating to the Tickets section.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to click 'View All' links on dashboard sections (Incidents, Alerts, etc.) to navigate to the full detail page for that section.

As an Family Contact, I need to be able to request an appointment (e.g., a family conference, a BH session, or a clinic visit) through the portal, and receive a confirmation once staff have approved the time, so that scheduling is streamlined.

As an Family Contact, I need to view a chronological list of all upcoming scheduled appointments and events, including relevant location details or telehealth links, so that I am always aware of future plans.
As an Family Contact, I need to receive automatic reminders (SMS/Email/Push) prior to a scheduled appointment, so that I don't miss important meetings.

As an Family Contact or Staff Member, I need to be able to attach documents or photos (e.g., hospital discharge papers, new insurance cards) to a messaging thread, so that critical information can be shared instantly and securely.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to toggle between 'Upcoming' and 'Past' tabs on the Appointments page, so that I can view both future and historical appointments.

As an Family Contact, I should be able to view full appointment details including date, time range, resident name, program type (ADH/ALF), facility address, assigned provider with avatar, and telehealth link (if applicable) on each appointment card.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to cancel an upcoming appointment using the 'Cancel Meet' button on the appointment card, so that I can manage my schedule changes.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to reschedule an upcoming appointment using the 'Reschedule' button, so that I can adjust timing without creating a new request.

As an Family Contact, I should be able to fill in a 'Request Meet' form with Appointment Mode (In-Person/Virtual), Time Window, Family Member selection, Facility, Preferred Provider, and a message, so that I can provide all necessary details for scheduling.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to search appointments by keyword on the Appointments page.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to click a telehealth link directly from the appointment card to join a virtual session.
As an Family Contact and Provider, I need to receive unique, secure links to join a scheduled video visit session, so that the telehealth process is simple and immediate.
As a Family Memeber, I need the system to automatically create or link the telehealth session to a patient encounter record, so that documentation of the service provided is immediate and accurate.

As a Family Contact or Provider, I need access to a basic connectivity check tool (test audio, video, and network speed) before joining a visit, so that I can troubleshoot technical issues proactively.
As a Patient, I should be able to view statements and payment history under Billing.
As a patient, I should be able to view statements details in PDF format.
As a patient, I should be able to do payment by adding cards details
As an Family Contact, I should receive a payment confirmation after successfully submitting a payment
As a patient, I should be able to view Payment history with details.
As a patient, I should be able to view my payment statements so that I can keep track of my healthcare expenses and payments made.
As an Family Contact of a Medicaid-only patient, I should be able to view and download invoices.
As an Family Contact, I should receive a monthly patient summary report alongside the invoice, showing changes in medications, vitals, alerts, and incidents over the last 30 days
As a Patient, I should be able to View my Personal Details
As a Patient, I should be able to view my Insurance details
As a Patient, I should be able to change my password.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view basic facility information

column3: View Linked Family Members with status badge
column4: As an Family Contact, I should be able to view all linked family members with its status badge on my profile page showing each resident's name, program type (ADH/ALF), relationship, facility name, room number, and service type, so that I have a complete overview of my connections.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to see the count of Open Tickets, next visit date, family members on my profile page.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to click an 'Edit' button on my profile page to update my personal information (name, phone, email, DOB, address).
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view my loved one's current medication list in the portal
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view my loved one's recorded vitals (e.g., blood pressure, temperature) in the portal
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view my loved one's progress notes in the portal
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view important alerts related to my loved one in the portal
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view my loved one's allergy information in the portal
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view incident reports related to my loved one in the portal
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view the inventory of my loved one's personal belongings tracked by the facility
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view the upcoming events and activity calendar for my loved one in the portal
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view summary of daily participation

As an Family Contact, I should be able to create a new ticket by filling in a form with Title and Body (description), selecting the linked resident, and submitting, so that I can report issues to the facility.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to track the status and response of any support ticket I have submitted.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to toggle between 'Open' and 'Closed' tabs on the Tickets page, so that I can view active and resolved tickets separately.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view ticket cards showing Ticket ID, title, brief description, status badge (Open/Closed), date, and time, so that I can quickly scan all my tickets.

As an Family Contact, I should be able to click on a ticket to view its full detail panel showing Ticket ID, status badge, linked resident, complete description, and date/time of creation, so that I can review the full context.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to edit an open ticket using the Edit button on the ticket detail panel, so that I can update or add information.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to search tickets by keyword on the Tickets page.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to filter tickets on the Tickets page.
As an Family Contact, I should receive a notification (email/SMS/push) when the facility shares a new document requiring my review or signature.
As an Family Contact, I should receive a notification when an incident has been reported for my loved one, so that I am immediately informed.
As an Family Contact, I should receive a notification when a new message is posted in the group chat, so that I don't miss any important communication.
As an Family Contact, I should receive a notification when my support ticket status is updated or resolved by the facility.
As an Family Contact/Patient, I should receive a friendly payment reminder between the 1st and 5th of the month if my invoice has not yet been paid.
As an Family Contact/Patient, I should be notified when a late fee has been applied to my account after the payment due date has passed.
As an Family Contact, I should receive a notification when a new invoice is generated.
As an Family Contact, I should receive a notification when a new alert is added to my loved one's record.
As an Family Contact, I should receive a notification when a new facility event is published.
As an Family Contact, I should receive a reminder notification before an upcoming appointment or meeting.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to send and receive messages in a group chat that includes the operations manager and the assigned nurse.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view a list of all chat contacts  with their names, avatars, last message preview, and timestamp, so that I can select who to message.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to search for specific contacts or conversations using the search bar in the Chat section.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to initiate a voice call from a group chat conversation using the phone icon, so that I can quickly switch to a real-time conversation.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to see timestamps on chat messages showing when each message was sent, so that I can track the conversation timeline.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to see unread message count badges (e.g., '4') next to the Chat menu item in the sidebar, so that I know when new messages are waiting.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view documents shared by the facility and digitally sign documents that require my consent.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to upload documents (e.g., insurance cards, hospital papers).
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view the signing status of documents.

As an Family Contact, I should be able to view the 'Mandatory' tab listing all required documents (e.g., Intake Form, Contract Of Patient, State Specific Documents, TB Test, Adult Day Health Agreement) with owner and creation date, so that I know which documents are required.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view the 'My Space' tab showing my personal folders and documents in both grid and list views, so that I can manage my own uploaded files.

As an Family Contact, I should be able to view the 'Group Space' tab listing shared document groups with Group Name, Description, Owner, Members (with avatars), and Created Date, so that I can access shared document areas.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to click on a group in Group Space to view its contents (folders and documents inside the group), so that I can access shared files.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to create a new folder in My Space by entering a Folder Name and optionally uploading documents during creation, so that I can organize my files.

As an Family Contact, I should be able to upload a document within a folder by providing a Document Name and dragging-and-dropping or browsing for files (.png, .jpg, up to 5MB), so that I can add files to specific locations.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to toggle between grid view and list view for documents, so that I can choose my preferred way of browsing files.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to search for documents by name across all tabs.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to filter documents on the Documents page.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to star/favorite documents for quick access.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to navigate through nested folders using breadcrumb navigation (e.g., Documents > Folder 1), so that I can easily move between folder levels.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to view document metadata including Name, Owner, and Created Date in the list view.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to see a progress bar when uploading documents showing percentage complete and estimated time remaining, so that I know the upload status.
As an Family Contact, I should be able to delete an uploaded document from the upload queue (before saving) using the delete icon, so that I can remove incorrect files.
